This tax day, 50 of your workdays funded war. 9 of them helped feed hungry kids.

Our priorities are backwards. It's time to invest in people, not Pentagon contractors. (Source: https://www.nationalpriorities.org/analysis/2026/tax-day-2026/) 
#TaxDay2026 #PeopleOverProfit

data.body:
Not in Westminster parliaments, the formal party system did not begin until the 1800s.

In Canada MPs are representatives of their electoral district first, members of a political party second. 

There is no requirement to be a party member.

Even the American founders were against the party system.

When my dad went back to the site of his BC internment camp in the summer of 1977, I remember him looking around trying to find the remains of the baseball diamond they'd built.
I inherited my uncle's photo albums, and there are pics of various sports (including handmade hockey sticks).
